form.label: Performance Alert Dashboard
form.description: Crytica Security performance alert investigation dashboard

search.query: index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" earliest=0 latest=now | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="10" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Integrity" | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | where alert_id!="Unknown" AND alert_id!="" | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown"),0) | eval element_change=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Other/Unclassified"),0) | stats latest(normalized_event_time) AS normalized_event_time latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(element_change) AS element_change latest(subject) AS subject latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state BY alert_id | sort 0 normalized_event_time | eval is_new_threat=if(workflow_state="open",1,0) | eval new_device=if(is_new_threat=1,device,null()) | eval new_severity=if(is_new_threat=1,severity,null()) | eval new_element_change=if(is_new_threat=1,element_change,null()) | eval new_subject=if(is_new_threat=1,subject,null()) | stats count AS threat_alerts sum(is_new_threat) AS new_threat_alerts latest(new_device) AS threat_device latest(new_severity) AS threat_severity latest(new_element_change) AS threat_element_change latest(new_subject) AS threat_subject | eval threat_alerts=coalesce(threat_alerts,0), new_threat_alerts=coalesce(new_threat_alerts,0), threat_device=coalesce(threat_device,"--"), threat_severity=coalesce(threat_severity,"--"), threat_element_change=coalesce(threat_element_change,"--"), threat_subject=coalesce(threat_subject,"--")

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" earliest=0 latest=now | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | where alert_id!="Unknown" AND alert_id!="" | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown"),0) | eval element_change=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Performance Alert"),0) | stats latest(normalized_event_time) AS normalized_event_time latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(element_change) AS element_change latest(subject) AS subject latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state BY alert_id | sort 0 normalized_event_time | eval is_new_performance=if(workflow_state="open",1,0) | eval new_device=if(is_new_performance=1,device,null()) | eval new_severity=if(is_new_performance=1,severity,null()) | eval new_element_change=if(is_new_performance=1,element_change,null()) | eval new_subject=if(is_new_performance=1,subject,null()) | stats count AS performance_alerts sum(is_new_performance) AS new_performance_alerts latest(new_device) AS performance_device latest(new_severity) AS performance_severity latest(new_element_change) AS performance_element_change latest(new_subject) AS performance_subject | eval performance_alerts=coalesce(performance_alerts,0), new_performance_alerts=coalesce(new_performance_alerts,0), performance_device=coalesce(performance_device,"--"), performance_severity=coalesce(performance_severity,"--"), performance_element_change=coalesce(performance_element_change,"--"), performance_subject=coalesce(performance_subject,"--")

a.aria-label: Open Crytica Security RDAi main dashboard

search.query: index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=priority output=root_priority | spath path=event.priority output=wrapped_priority | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=object_path output=root_object_path | spath path=event.object_path output=wrapped_object_path | spath path=file_path output=root_file_path | spath path=event.file_path output=wrapped_file_path | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | spath path=scan_date output=root_scan_time | spath path=fields.scan_date output=root_fields_scan_time | spath path=event.fields.scan_date output=wrapped_fields_scan_time | rex field=_raw "\"scan_date\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_scan_date>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,scan_date,root_scan_time,root_fields_scan_time,wrapped_fields_scan_time,raw_scan_date)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval priority=lower(mvindex(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown"),0)) | eval signature=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown"),0) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown"),0) | eval object_path=mvindex(coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown"),0) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,"Unknown"),0)) | eval source=mvindex(coalesce(source,root_source,"Unknown"),0) | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state acknowledged_by acknowledged_at resolved_by resolved_at ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval performance_signal=signature | eval risk=severity_score+15+priority_score | eval _time=normalized_event_time | stats latest(normalized_event_time) AS normalized_event_time latest(risk) AS risk latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(priority) AS priority latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state latest(acknowledged_by) AS acknowledged_by latest(acknowledged_at) AS acknowledged_at latest(resolved_by) AS resolved_by latest(resolved_at) AS resolved_at latest(performance_signal) AS performance_signal latest(subject) AS subject latest(object_path) AS object_path latest(source) AS source BY alert_id | eval age_minutes=round((now()-normalized_event_time)/60,1) | eval event_time=strftime(normalized_event_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval acknowledged_by=coalesce(acknowledged_by,"--"), acknowledged_time=if(tonumber(acknowledged_at)>0,strftime(tonumber(acknowledged_at),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),"--"), resolved_by=coalesce(resolved_by,"--"), resolved_time=if(tonumber(resolved_at)>0,strftime(tonumber(resolved_at),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),"--") | eval investigation_pivot="device=" . device . " alert_id=" . alert_id . " object=" . object_path | sort 0 - normalized_event_time | head 1 | table alert_id risk event_time age_minutes device severity priority workflow_state acknowledged_by acknowledged_time resolved_by resolved_time performance_signal subject object_path source investigation_pivot | rename alert_id AS "Alert ID" risk AS "Risk" event_time AS "Time" age_minutes AS "Age Min" device AS "Device" severity AS "Severity" priority AS "Priority" workflow_state AS "Workflow State" acknowledged_by AS "Acknowledged By" acknowledged_time AS "Acknowledged Time" resolved_by AS "Resolved By" resolved_time AS "Resolved Time" performance_signal AS "Performance Signal" subject AS "Subject" object_path AS "Object" source AS "Source" investigation_pivot AS "Investigation Pivot"

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=object_path output=root_object_path | spath path=event.object_path output=wrapped_object_path | spath path=file_path output=root_file_path | spath path=event.file_path output=wrapped_file_path | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=crytica_details.device_info.device_os_type_name output=root_os | spath path=event.crytica_details.device_info.device_os_type_name output=wrapped_os | spath path=device_os_type_name output=root_flat_os | spath path=event.device_os_type_name output=wrapped_flat_os | spath path=crytica_details.module_info.module_name output=root_module | spath path=event.crytica_details.module_info.module_name output=wrapped_module | spath path=fields.module_name output=fields_module | spath path=event.fields.module_name output=wrapped_fields_module | spath path=crytica_details.scan_details.scan_scope output=root_scope | spath path=event.crytica_details.scan_details.scan_scope output=wrapped_scope | spath path=fields.scan_scope output=fields_scope | spath path=event.fields.scan_scope output=wrapped_fields_scope | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | spath path=scan_date output=root_scan_time | spath path=fields.scan_date output=root_fields_scan_time | spath path=event.fields.scan_date output=wrapped_fields_scan_time | rex field=_raw "\"scan_date\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_scan_date>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,scan_date,root_scan_time,root_fields_scan_time,wrapped_fields_scan_time,raw_scan_date)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state acknowledged_by acknowledged_at resolved_by resolved_at ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eventstats latest(device) AS latest_device latest(normalized_event_time) AS latest_time | where device=latest_device | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval signature=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown"),0) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,"Unknown"),0) | eval object_path=mvindex(coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown"),0) | eval os=mvindex(coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown"),0) | eval module=mvindex(coalesce(module_name,fields_module,wrapped_fields_module,root_module,wrapped_module,"Unknown"),0) | eval scan_scope=mvindex(coalesce(scan_scope,fields_scope,wrapped_fields_scope,root_scope,wrapped_scope,"Unknown"),0) | stats dc(alert_id) AS alerts dc(signature) AS unique_signatures max(severity_score) AS peak_severity_score values(signature) AS signatures latest(subject) AS latest_subject values(object_path) AS objects values(os) AS os values(module) AS modules values(scan_scope) AS scan_scopes latest(normalized_event_time) AS last_seen BY device | eval peak_severity=case(peak_severity_score>=50,"critical",peak_severity_score>=40,"high",peak_severity_score>=25,"medium",peak_severity_score>=10,"low",true(),"unknown") | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | rename device AS "Device" alerts AS "Performance Alerts" unique_signatures AS "Unique Signatures" peak_severity AS "Peak Severity" signatures AS "Signatures" latest_subject AS "Latest Subject" objects AS "Objects" os AS "OS" modules AS "Modules" scan_scopes AS "Scan Scopes" last_seen AS "Last Seen" | table Device "Performance Alerts" "Unique Signatures" "Peak Severity" "Last Seen" "Latest Subject" Signatures Objects OS Modules "Scan Scopes"

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=priority output=root_priority | spath path=event.priority output=wrapped_priority | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=object_path output=root_object_path | spath path=event.object_path output=wrapped_object_path | spath path=file_path output=root_file_path | spath path=event.file_path output=wrapped_file_path | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval event_time=strftime(normalized_event_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval priority=lower(mvindex(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown"),0)) | eval signature=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown"),0) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,"Unknown"),0) | eval object_path=mvindex(coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown"),0) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state acknowledged_by acknowledged_at resolved_by resolved_at ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | eval _time=normalized_event_time | stats latest(event_time) AS event_time latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(priority) AS priority latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state latest(acknowledged_by) AS acknowledged_by latest(acknowledged_at) AS acknowledged_at latest(resolved_by) AS resolved_by latest(resolved_at) AS resolved_at latest(signature) AS signature latest(subject) AS subject latest(object_path) AS object_path BY alert_id | eval acknowledged_by=coalesce(acknowledged_by,"--"), acknowledged_time=if(tonumber(acknowledged_at)>0,strftime(tonumber(acknowledged_at),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),"--"), resolved_by=coalesce(resolved_by,"--"), resolved_time=if(tonumber(resolved_at)>0,strftime(tonumber(resolved_at),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),"--") | rename event_time AS "Time" device AS "Device" severity AS "Severity" priority AS "Priority" workflow_state AS "Workflow State" acknowledged_by AS "Acknowledged By" acknowledged_time AS "Acknowledged Time" resolved_by AS "Resolved By" resolved_time AS "Resolved Time" signature AS "Signature" subject AS "Subject" object_path AS "Object" alert_id AS "Alert ID" | table "Alert ID" Time Device Severity Priority "Workflow State" "Acknowledged By" "Acknowledged Time" "Resolved By" "Resolved Time" Signature Subject Object | sort 0 - Time

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | eval device=coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,host,"Unknown") | stats count BY device | sort - count | head 10

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | eval subject=coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,"Unknown") | stats count BY subject | sort - count
